name: Flag a Factual Issue
about: Report an inaccurate statistic, outdated information, or missing citation
title: "[FACT CHECK] Chapter X: [Brief description]"
labels: fact-check
assignees: ''
---

## Chapter
Which chapter contains the issue?

## The Claim
Quote the specific claim you believe is inaccurate or needs updating.

## The Issue
What is wrong or outdated?

## Suggested Correction
What should it say? Please include your source.

## Source
Link or citation for the correct information.
